# Clawbrowser

> Clawbrowser is a Chromium-based browser with managed fingerprints and transparent proxy routing, built for AI agent automation and multi-account management.

## What Clawbrowser does

Clawbrowser is a Chromium fork with an embedded library (libclaw) that spoofs 20+ browser fingerprint surfaces (Canvas, WebGL, AudioContext, navigator.*, screen, fonts, timezone, language, battery, plugins, and more), routes all traffic through a matching residential or datacenter proxy, and exposes a standard Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP) endpoint fully compatible with Playwright, Puppeteer, and any CDP-based automation tool.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://clawbrowser.ai
- Documentation: https://clawbrowser.ai/docs
- Blog: https://clawbrowser.ai/blog
- GitHub: https://github.com/clawbrowser/clawbrowser
- Releases: https://github.com/clawbrowser/clawbrowser/releases
- API key dashboard: https://app.clawbrowser.ai

## Install

curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/clawbrowser/clawbrowser/main/scripts/install.sh | bash -s -- claude

Targets: claude, codex, gemini, all

## Use cases

- AI agent browser automation (anti-bot evasion at scale)
- Multi-account management
- Web scraping with fingerprint isolation
- CDP automation with Playwright, Puppeteer

## Licensing

Clawbrowser is commercial software. An API key is required. Obtain one at https://app.clawbrowser.ai.
